title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MobiKwik - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MobiKwik - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik:
MobiKwik is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
